data.body: Starting epic a88f-78db-2e24-496c (LLM Workflow Engine), 12 stories / 25 tasks. Mapped codebase conventions (event types, schemas, CLI, MCP, runner). Implementing in dependency order. First: WS-B (DSL+schema+lint+CLI, story 5a52). KEY DECISION: workflow DSL YAML must parse in the lean core (workflows run without [agents]); the WS-J3 import-linter ban-list deliberately omits yaml, so adding pyyaml>=6 to core dependencies is faithful to the approved plan. Restricted loader on PyYAML SafeLoader: reject anchors/merge-keys, normalize 1.1->1.2-Core booleans, pre-parse byte cap.
